goal: Split live-verify into smaller bounded modules without regressing the gate, artifact, or policy flows.
successCriteria: live-verify.ts no longer carries the full transport, host, cloud, and gate orchestration in one file.
CLI wiring and artifact outputs stay stable across the refactor.
Module boundaries reflect package-first evidence responsibilities instead of transcript-only conventions.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Changing probe semantics or widening the live-verify surface beyond refactor needs.
Reopening Phase 1 cloud runtime or node scope through the split.
